content: Four proposed actions, all to auto-execute unless noted: AP-01 = pay_invoice (auto, ref INV-02); AP-04 = write_off 6.50 USD (auto); AP-05 = issue_debit_note (staged); AP-09 = po_amendment (auto, ref PO-8803). Run the approval gate on each and list the ids that are UNSAFE to auto-execute, as a comma-separated list.
